comparison.description:
### Compare all models on the same video
Runs inference with all selected models and shows results side-by-side.

footer.text:
**Knowledge Distillation for Mobile Action Recognition**
University Project · Deep Learning Course
Department of Mathematics and Computer Science · **University of Catania**
Running on {device} · HMDB-51 Dataset ({num_classes} classes)

errors.upload_video: Please upload a video before proceeding.
errors.no_videos_in_class: No videos found in the selected class.
errors.no_preview: Select a video to view the preview.

models.teacher_desc: 3D ResNet-50 fine-tuned from Kinetics-400 weights. Upper-bound reference for the KD pipeline.
models.student_desc: 3D MobileNet trained from scratch on HMDB-51. Lower-bound baseline without any knowledge transfer.
models.student_distilled_t10_desc: 3D MobileNet distilled with logit-matching KD at T=10. Soft targets transfer 'dark knowledge' from the Teacher.
models.student_at_desc: 3D MobileNet with KD (T=10) + Attention Transfer (β=1000). Best student model — bridges 68% of the Teacher-Baseline gap.
models.student_kd_t1: KD with T=1 (hard targets only, equivalent to label smoothing).
models.student_kd_t20: KD with T=20 (highly softened, near-uniform distributions).
models.student_at_beta10: KD + AT with reduced β=10 (balanced loss weighting).
models.student_kd_t10_w1_5: Wider student (α=1.5, ~4.7M params) with KD T=10. ~7× compression vs Teacher.

gradcam.class_mode_info: ground_truth — uses the video's known label as Grad-CAM target (only available for dataset videos). predicted — uses the model's top-1 predicted class as target. manual — lets you pick any class from the list.
gradcam.layer_info: layer4 — last ResNet block, high-level semantics (recommended for Teacher/ResNet). layer3 — penultimate ResNet block, mid-level features. stages[-1] — last MobileNet stage, recommended for Student models. stages[4] — earlier MobileNet stage, lower-level features. You can also type a custom layer name.
gradcam.manual_class_info: Select the action class to use as the Grad-CAM target. Only active when 'manual' mode is selected.
gradcam.err_select_video: Please select a video from the dataset.
gradcam.err_no_ground_truth: No Ground Truth available for uploaded videos. Choose 'Predicted' or 'Manual'.
